nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I typically use AI to draft those templates

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI's tendency to produce overly casual or stiff writing
nodes.grounding_span: The templates are usually too casual; when I ask it to make it more formal, the writing becomes stiff

nodes.label: AI adaptation to audience and market nuances
nodes.grounding_span: AI doesn't know the details of the scenario as well as I do

nodes.label: AI adherence to instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI's failure to follow precise instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I gave it very clear instructions and it still was not able to pull out all the bullet points

nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
AI use constrained by data security
nodes.grounding_span: If it became secure enough, I'd love for AI to have access to my work email

nodes.label: Human touch in sensitive industry
nodes.grounding_span: agents and buyers/sellers like to have a 'human touch'

nodes.label: Organizational trust and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: the security issue remains a blocker

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I typically use AI to draft those templates

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting
nodes.grounding_span: AI did make me feel fairly frustrated once

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I could see my relationship evolving to have it take over some tasks, but not very many

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: It does not seem to be in the near future

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I usually do a bit of back and forth

nodes.label: Context-driven audience adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I have to take into account the target audience
